item.title: Design Review Committee Meeting Scheduled
item.description: Design Review Committee Meeting is scheduled for August 5, 2026 at 5:00 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Water Commission Regular Meeting - Cancelled
item.description: Water Commission Regular Meeting - Cancelled is scheduled for July 27, 2026 at 5:30 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Junk Drop Off Event
item.description: Junk Drop Off Event is scheduled for July 25, 2026 at 8:30 AM at San Jon Yard, 336 San Jon Rd Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours Scheduled
item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for July 23, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.

item.title: College Area Community Council
item.description: College Area Community Council is scheduled for July 22, 2026 at 7:00 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.
